changes.summary: ISQ OpenInfra Mar 31, 2026 NAV $32.08 (Class F-I Series II), -0.62% MoM. Series II Transactional NAV $233.3M (+12.7%). April subs $52.4M.

KKR Infra Conglomerate Mar 31, 2026 NAV $29.96 (Class I), -1.06% MoM. Total Transactional NAV $7,230.7M (+2.9%). Effective Jan 1, 2026, new methodology capitalizes financing/acquisition costs over up to 10 years ($14.4M unamortized).
Ares ACI Mar 31, 2026 NAV $24.9176 (Class I/D/S), -0.03% MoM. Aggregate NAV $3,130.0M (+12.5%). April closing $313.1M finalized. Class I April distribution $0.20830.
Ares ACI acquired BCP Renaissance subsidiaries on April 28, 2026 (Rover Credit Agreement ~$1.09B Term Loans SOFR+2.25%; $750M Morgan Stanley swap at 3.7566% fixed).
Stonepeak Plus Mar 31, 2026 NAV $32.15 (Class I-1), +1.23% MoM. SP+ INFRA cumulative capital raised $1,292.4M ($100.5M April subs). Class I-1 March distribution $0.2400/unit (record Mar 31).
Stonepeak Plus filed Third Amended & Restated LPA on May 5, 2026 (Item 5.03), creating new Class Z series.

Partners Group Infra Evergreen Feb 28, 2026 NAV per Unit (Class I) $1.8426. Total Fund net assets $257.8M; 6,997,121 Units outstanding. Tender offer commenced for up to 5% NAV (~$12.9M) at Mar 31 valuation date.

Brookfield BII Q1 2026 quarterly tender offer (Feb 25, 2026 commencement) closed Mar 25, 2026. Aggregate NAV $27.02M tendered at Mar 31, 2026 valuation. Fund paid $26.99M Apr 29, 2026 net of 2% Early Withdrawal Fees.
changes.source: SEC SC TO-I/A Final Amendment filed 2026-05-08 acc 0001213900-26-053734
